x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Engagement Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
•    Understanding how customers interact with products, services, and brands.•
    Tracking purchase patterns, website navigation, and engagement with marketing content.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Demographic Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
•    Analyzing customer characteristics such as age, gender, income, education, and location.•
    Identifying trends and preferences within specific demographic groups.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Psychographic Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
•    Exploring customers' lifestyles, values, interests, and attitudes.•
    Understanding the underlying motivations and emotional triggers that influence purchasing decisions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Satisfaction and Sentiment Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: •    Assessing customer satisfaction and sentiment towards products and services

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Journey Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
•    Mapping the entire customer journey from awareness to purchase and beyond.•
    Identifying touchpoints, pain points, and opportunities to improve the customer experience.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Retention and Churn Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
•    Understanding the factors that influence customer retention and attrition.•
    Identifying at-risk customers and implementing strategies to reduce churn.
